requirement: Definitions and Abbreviations............................1
Section Name: Definitions and Abbreviations............................1

requirement: The system shall provide an enterprise-grade platform for managing programme delivery, resource allocation, and stakeholder reporting across multiple concurrent projects.
Section Name: The system shall provide an enterprise-grade platform for managing programme delivery, resource allocation, and stakeholder reporting across multiple concurrent projects.

requirement: The system shall serve as the single authoritative source of truth for all programme-level requirements, decisions, and delivery artefacts.
Section Name: The system shall serve as the single authoritative source of truth for all programme-level requirements, decisions, and delivery artefacts.

requirement: The system shall be accessible to all authorised users within the enterprise network without requiring local software installation beyond a supported web browser.
Section Name: The system shall be accessible to all authorised users within the enterprise network without requiring local software installation beyond a supported web browser.

requirement:
The system shall support the following user roles and their associated permissions:
- Programme Manager
- Project Manager
- Business Analyst
- Read-Only Viewer
Section Name: The system shall support the following user roles and their associated permissions:

requirement:
The system shall integrate with the following enterprise systems via published APIs:
- Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)
- Human Resources Information System (HRIS)
- Document Management System (DMS)
Section Name: The system shall integrate with the following enterprise systems via published APIs:

requirement: Integration with the ERP system shall use the REST API documented in ERP-API-SPEC-v3.2, with OAuth 2.0 authentication.
Section Name: Integration with the ERP system shall use the REST API documented in ERP-API-SPEC-v3.2, with OAuth 2.0 authentication.

requirement: The system shall synchronise user account data from HRIS on a scheduled basis no less frequently than every 4 hours during business hours.
Section Name: The system shall synchronise user account data from HRIS on a scheduled basis no less frequently than every 4 hours during business hours.

requirement: All abbreviations used in this document shall be defined in the Glossary at Annex A of the project's Document Management Plan.
Section Name: All abbreviations used in this document shall be defined in the Glossary at Annex A of the project's Document Management Plan.

requirement: Where a term used in a requirement has a specific technical meaning that differs from its common English meaning, the technical definition shall take precedence and shall be referenced explicitly.
Section Name: Where a term used in a requirement has a specific technical meaning that differs from its common English meaning, the technical definition shall take precedence and shall be referenced explicitly.

requirement: The system shall implement all functional requirements described in this section as mandatory capabilities for the initial system release.
Section Name: The system shall implement all functional requirements described in this section as mandatory capabilities for the initial system release.

requirement: The user interface shall comply with WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility standards throughout all screens and user workflows.
Section Name: The user interface shall comply with WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility standards throughout all screens and user workflows.

requirement: The interface shall support keyboard-only navigation for all primary user functions without requiring mouse interaction.
Section Name: The interface shall support keyboard-only navigation for all primary user functions without requiring mouse interaction.

requirement: The interface shall be responsive and shall display correctly on screen widths from 1024px to 3840px without horizontal scrolling.
Section Name: The interface shall be responsive and shall display correctly on screen widths from 1024px to 3840px without horizontal scrolling.

requirement:
The interface shall provide the following view modes for requirement lists:
- Flat list sorted by requirement number
- Hierarchical tree view
- Filter view (filter by status, owner, priority)
- Traceability matrix view
Section Name: The interface shall provide the following view modes for requirement lists:

requirement: The system shall enforce all business rules defined in the Business Rules Register (BRR-2024-001) without exception.
Section Name: The system shall enforce all business rules defined in the Business Rules Register (BRR-2024-001) without exception.

requirement: The system shall prevent a requirement from being set to status 'Approved' unless all mandatory attributes have been populated.
Section Name: The system shall prevent a requirement from being set to status 'Approved' unless all mandatory attributes have been populated.

requirement:
Mandatory attributes for approval shall include:
- Title (non-empty string, max 200 characters)
- Description (non-empty string)
- Priority (one of: Critical, High, Medium, Low)
- Owner (a valid user account)
- Verification Method (one of: Test, Inspection, Analysis, Demonstration)
Section Name: Mandatory attributes for approval shall include:

requirement: The system shall generate an audit log entry for every state transition of a requirement, recording the user, timestamp, previous state, new state, and an optional comment.
Section Name: The system shall generate an audit log entry for every state transition of a requirement, recording the user, timestamp, previous state, new state, and an optional comment.

requirement: The system shall provide a built-in reporting module with at minimum the standard reports defined in Annex B.
Section Name: The system shall provide a built-in reporting module with at minimum the standard reports defined in Annex B.

requirement:
All reports shall be exportable in the following formats:
- PDF (using the organisation standard report template)
- Microsoft Excel (.xlsx)
- CSV (UTF-8 encoded)
Section Name: All reports shall be exportable in the following formats:

requirement: Reports shall be generated on-demand and shall reflect the current live data at the moment the report is run.
Section Name: Reports shall be generated on-demand and shall reflect the current live data at the moment the report is run.

requirement: The system shall support scheduled report generation with delivery by email to a configured distribution list.
Section Name: The system shall support scheduled report generation with delivery by email to a configured distribution list.

requirement: All data stored and processed by the system shall comply with the organisation's Data Classification Policy and applicable data protection legislation.
Section Name: All data stored and processed by the system shall comply with the organisation's Data Classification Policy and applicable data protection legislation.

requirement: All persistent data shall be stored in the organisation-approved relational database, which shall be hosted in the primary data centre.
Section Name: All persistent data shall be stored in the organisation-approved relational database, which shall be hosted in the primary data centre.

requirement: The database shall be configured with daily full backups and continuous transaction log backups retained for a minimum of 90 days.
Section Name: The database shall be configured with daily full backups and continuous transaction log backups retained for a minimum of 90 days.

requirement: Data at rest shall be encrypted using AES-256 or stronger with key management performed by the enterprise key management service.
Section Name: Data at rest shall be encrypted using AES-256 or stronger with key management performed by the enterprise key management service.

requirement: The system shall implement controls to ensure the integrity of all stored data including referential integrity, constraint validation, and audit trails.
Section Name: The system shall implement controls to ensure the integrity of all stored data including referential integrity, constraint validation, and audit trails.

requirement: The system shall perform referential integrity checks before committing any transaction that modifies parent-child relationships between artefacts.
Section Name: The system shall perform referential integrity checks before committing any transaction that modifies parent-child relationships between artefacts.

requirement: The system shall maintain an immutable audit trail for all modifications to requirements, links, and configuration settings.
Section Name: The system shall maintain an immutable audit trail for all modifications to requirements, links, and configuration settings.

requirement:
The audit trail shall record the following for each event:
- Event type and timestamp
- User identity (username and display name)
- Source IP address
- Object identifier and type
- Previous and new values for changed attributes
Section Name: The audit trail shall record the following for each event:

requirement: All security requirements in this annex are mandatory and shall be implemented prior to any production deployment of the system.
Section Name: All security requirements in this annex are mandatory and shall be implemented prior to any production deployment of the system.

requirement: The system shall implement multi-factor authentication (MFA) as the default and mandatory authentication method for all user accounts.
Section Name: The system shall implement multi-factor authentication (MFA) as the default and mandatory authentication method for all user accounts.

requirement:
Supported second factors shall include at minimum:
- Time-based one-time password (TOTP) via authenticator app
- Hardware security key (FIDO2/WebAuthn)
Section Name: Supported second factors shall include at minimum:

requirement:
The system shall enforce a minimum password complexity policy:
- Minimum 14 characters
- At least one uppercase, one lowercase, one digit, one special character
- Not matching any of the previous 24 passwords
Section Name: The system shall enforce a minimum password complexity policy:

requirement: Service accounts shall use certificate-based authentication and shall not be permitted to use password-based authentication.
Section Name: Service accounts shall use certificate-based authentication and shall not be permitted to use password-based authentication.

requirement: The system shall implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) with the principle of least privilege applied to all roles.
Section Name: The system shall implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) with the principle of least privilege applied to all roles.

requirement: Role assignments shall be reviewed by the system administrator no less than every 90 days and any inactive accounts shall be disabled.
Section Name: Role assignments shall be reviewed by the system administrator no less than every 90 days and any inactive accounts shall be disabled.

requirement: Access to sensitive data classifications shall require explicit role assignment and shall not be inherited from parent roles.
Section Name: Access to sensitive data classifications shall require explicit role assignment and shall not be inherited from parent roles.

requirement: All cryptographic operations shall use algorithms and key lengths approved in the organisation's Cryptographic Standards document (SEC-STD-003).
Section Name: All cryptographic operations shall use algorithms and key lengths approved in the organisation's Cryptographic Standards document (SEC-STD-003).

requirement: Deprecated algorithms (MD5, SHA-1, DES, 3DES, RC4) shall not be used in any new system component.
Section Name: Deprecated algorithms (MD5, SHA-1, DES, 3DES, RC4) shall not be used in any new system component.

requirement: TLS 1.3 shall be the minimum version for all external connections; TLS 1.2 is permitted for internal connections pending legacy system migration.
Section Name: TLS 1.3 shall be the minimum version for all external connections; TLS 1.2 is permitted for internal connections pending legacy system migration.

requirement: The system shall be subject to regular security assessments as part of the organisation's vulnerability management programme.
Section Name: The system shall be subject to regular security assessments as part of the organisation's vulnerability management programme.

requirement: The system shall undergo a full penetration test prior to initial production deployment and annually thereafter.
Section Name: The system shall undergo a full penetration test prior to initial production deployment and annually thereafter.

requirement:
Critical and High severity findings from penetration tests and vulnerability scans shall be remediated within the following timeframes:
- Critical — within 7 calendar days of identification
- High — within 30 calendar days of identification
- Medium — within 90 calendar days of identification
Section Name: Critical and High severity findings from penetration tests and vulnerability scans shall be remediated within the following timeframes:

requirement: The performance requirements in this annex define the measurable service levels that the system shall achieve under normal and peak load conditions.
Section Name: The performance requirements in this annex define the measurable service levels that the system shall achieve under normal and peak load conditions.

requirement: The system shall meet the following response time requirements under normal load conditions (defined as up to 200 concurrent active users).
Section Name: The system shall meet the following response time requirements under normal load conditions (defined as up to 200 concurrent active users).

requirement: Page load time for all primary user interface screens shall not exceed 2 seconds at the 95th percentile.
Section Name: Page load time for all primary user interface screens shall not exceed 2 seconds at the 95th percentile.

requirement: API responses for read operations shall complete within 500ms at the 95th percentile and within 2 seconds at the 99th percentile.
Section Name: API responses for read operations shall complete within 500ms at the 95th percentile and within 2 seconds at the 99th percentile.

requirement: Report generation for standard reports covering up to 10,000 requirements shall complete within 30 seconds.
Section Name: Report generation for standard reports covering up to 10,000 requirements shall complete within 30 seconds.

requirement: The system shall support a minimum throughput of 1,000 requirement read/write operations per minute under normal load.
Section Name: The system shall support a minimum throughput of 1,000 requirement read/write operations per minute under normal load.

requirement: Batch import operations shall support ingestion of at least 5,000 requirements per hour without degradation of interactive user performance.
Section Name: Batch import operations shall support ingestion of at least 5,000 requirements per hour without degradation of interactive user performance.

requirement: The system shall achieve an availability of 99.5% measured over any rolling 30-day period, excluding planned maintenance windows.
Section Name: The system shall achieve an availability of 99.5% measured over any rolling 30-day period, excluding planned maintenance windows.

requirement: Planned maintenance windows shall not exceed 4 hours per calendar month and shall be scheduled outside core business hours (08:00–18:00 local time, Monday to Friday).
Section Name: Planned maintenance windows shall not exceed 4 hours per calendar month and shall be scheduled outside core business hours (08:00–18:00 local time, Monday to Friday).

requirement: The system shall implement automatic failover to the secondary data centre within 15 minutes of a primary data centre failure being detected.
Section Name: The system shall implement automatic failover to the secondary data centre within 15 minutes of a primary data centre failure being detected.

requirement: The system architecture shall support horizontal scaling to accommodate growth in user numbers and data volumes without architectural rework.
Section Name: The system architecture shall support horizontal scaling to accommodate growth in user numbers and data volumes without architectural rework.

requirement: The system shall scale to support at least 2,000 concurrent active users by adding application server capacity without database schema changes.
Section Name: The system shall scale to support at least 2,000 concurrent active users by adding application server capacity without database schema changes.

requirement: Data storage shall scale to accommodate a minimum of 1,000,000 requirement artefacts without performance degradation beyond the thresholds in 1.1.
Section Name: Data storage shall scale to accommodate a minimum of 1,000,000 requirement artefacts without performance degradation beyond the thresholds in 1.1.
